description_long: This is a wooden storage box with a rustic, weathered appearance, featuring a square shape and reinforced with diagonal wooden planks forming an 'X' pattern on each visible side. The wood grain and subtle stains suggest it has been exposed to the elements or heavy use, making it suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments. The box is open at the top, lacking any visible lid or cover, and the interior appears hollow, indicating it is designed to hold or transport items. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, giving it a utilitarian and robust look. The construction appears sturdy, with thick wooden panels joined at the edges, and the flat top rim could support additional objects or stacking. Its size and build make it ideal for placement on the ground in garages, alleys, or storage yards.
description: A weathered, square wooden storage box with an open top and reinforced 'X' plank design on each side, suitable for rugged urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wooden box's 'X' plank reinforcement and open top, with visible wood grain and stains.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same 'X' plank pattern and open top.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front and side, with the same 'X' plank design and open top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the 'X' plank reinforcement and open top, consistent with other sides.
